title: A Very Blocky Christmas
description: This is a survival friendly datapack for Minecraft that adds new Christmas themed items, recipes, advancements, and a song.
body:
This datapack is designed to bring some Christmas spirit to Minecraft, even if it's not winter time it still adds some cool items to your Minecraft world.

[Resource Pack (REQUIRED)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/a-very-blocky-christmas-resource-pack/versions)

This datapack is made by PiglinGold99, who is also the creator of the [Fishing Overhaul Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fishing-overhaul), although that account I've lost.

A full guide on everything in the datapack has yet to be made, but will appear here in the future.

**The datapack has yet to be tested on server but your welcome to try!**
